word: H8388 - תָּאַר - tâʼar - taw-ar' - Be drawn

sections.paragraph:
Original: תּאר

Transliteration: tâ'ar

Phonetic: taw-ar'

BDB Definition:

  1. (Qal) to be drawn, incline, delineate, extend
    1. meaning dubious
  2. (Piel) to draw in outline, trace out

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 2491,2491b

Part(s) of speech: Verb
